'''Red Threxa's Boarding House''' was a boarding house in [[Gelgelar Free Port/Legends|Gelgelar Free Port]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gelgelar/Legends|Gelgelar]]. It was the only place to rent a room at the port. It was run by the [[Suiraon]] [[Red Threxa]].

Situated in the middle of Gelgelar Free Port next to the [[Shrine of Kooroo]] and across from the [[Slippery Gelgelar Eel]], the boarding house was made of stolen prefab buildings and had a central common room built around a large heating unit, with various rooms and halls off to the side.

The boarding house was a cheap and dry place to stay, for a fee of fifteen [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per night. It was used mainly by [[Starship/Legends|ship]] crews on down time or pilgrims for the Shrine of Kooroo.
